description: This file defines an Angular service class 'AuthConfigurationService' responsible for managing tenant-specific authentication configuration, including fetching tenant configs, initializing AWS Amplify authentication, and cleaning local storage.

classes.name: AuthConfigurationService
classes.description: Angular service for managing tenant-specific authentication configuration, including fetching tenant configs, setting up AWS Amplify, and clearing local storage.

methods.name: setTenantConfig
methods.description: Fetches tenant configuration from API, updates local storage, and sets internal parameters.

methods.name: configureAmplifyAuth
methods.description: Initializes AWS Amplify authentication with stored tenant configuration.

methods.name: cleanLocalStorage
methods.description: Removes tenant-related data from local storage.
